[[General/Legends|General]] '''Khorak''' was the officer in charge of the operation to retrieve [[Nescan Tal'yo]]'s [[Holocube/Legends|holocube]]. His subordinate was [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shad (stormtrooper)|Shad]].

{{Char-stub}}
